headline: ₹100-300 Cr at risk (routine project execution and capex scale) — Adani Power secures 2,500 MW renewable RTC contract, strengthening green energy portfolio
what_matters: Triggers BRSR, CDP, GRI, TCFD disclosure obligations; no immediate penalties.
No near-term P/E rerating; incremental margin improvement possible as renewables scale.
Potential for marginally lower cost of capital if EU Taxonomy alignment is leveraged; no immediate bond spread impact.
